_comment: qa_invisible.json — nnqr-43 visual QA: is_invisible render convention. P1 piece at (3,4) is flagged is_invisible=true. P2 piece at (6,7) is flagged is_invisible=true. P1 piece at (2,2) and P2 piece at (7,8) are normal (visible). With _viewer_player==0 (default see-harness mode) all invisible pieces render as ghost outlines with a '?' label. Expected visuals: (1) P1 at (3,4) and P2 at (6,7) both show as faint ghost circles with '?' instead of solid tokens. (2) P1 at (2,2) and P2 at (7,8) render normally. No inputs — static visual state.
